sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115882" key="yuxasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῡχ-αστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115882.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who cools himself in the shade</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ψυχασταί, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>,</foreign> a play of Strattis.</sense> </entryFree>
